title: Motivator (Imperial-class)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1|title2=''Imperial''-class}} {{IndividualShip |image=[[File:Razor.jpg]] |name=''Motivator'' |designer= |manufacturer=[[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] |line= |model= |type=[[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]]{{JournalCite|10|Galaxywide NewsNets}} |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length=1,600 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement=*[[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]]s *[[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptors]] *[[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT walkers]] *[[All Terrain Personal Transport/Legends|AT-PT walkers]] |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role= |commission= |destroyed=[[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]], [[Kothlis/Legends|Kothlis]] |retired= |battles=*[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] **[[Battle of Maldra IV]] **[[Battle of Kothlis]] |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |navy=[[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] |fleet= |owners= |captains=[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Briera]] |crewmembers= |registry= |aliases= }} '''''Motivator''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. The vessel was destroyed by [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] while it was trying the capture [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Razor (CR90 corvette)|Razor]] to obtain the [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]] construction data onboard, resulting in it crashing on the surface of planet [[Kothlis/Legends|Kothlis]]. ==History== ===Early history=== In [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], the ''Motivator'' was under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Briera]] and destroyed the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] base on [[Maldra IV]]. ===Battle of Kothlis=== As the ''Razor'' proceeded to rendezvous with the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]], the ''Motivator'' jumped out of hyperspace and deployed squadrons of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]]. The timely appearance of Rebel fighter squadrons and the [[Redemption/Legends|Redemption]] turned the tide around, and an attack on the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] commenced. While ''Redemption'' traded fire with the Star Destroyer, [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron's]] three flights disabled its major batteries and engaged its [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]]. After the ''Motivator's'' shield generators had been disabled by damage to its main reactor, it prepared to jump into hyperspace with Razor safely tucked in its main hangar. In a desperate act, [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] was able to destroy the bridge, forcing the Star Destroyer into a dive to the surface. [[File:BattleofKothlis.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The ''Motivator'' crashed on [[Kothlis/Legends|Kothlis]].]] As the Star Destroyer crashed into the surface, an Alliance [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|GR-75 transport]] carrying [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] and a company of soldiers arrived to secure ''Razor''{{'s}} computer core. Rogue Squadron escorted the transport to the crash site and was surprised to find a portion of the Star Destroyer's ground forces had survived the crash. While arriving at the crash site, Madine reported that they have detected increasing temperatures in the Star Destroyer's core due to the damage it has already sustained, meaning that it will only be a matter of minutes before the core goes critical. As they were unwilling to risk their transport to get the data, the strike team was forced to land the transport.
Still operational [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-ATs]] and [[All Terrain Personal Transport/Legends|AT-PTs]] blasted their way through the Star Destroyer's hull and began to attack the rebel transport. As reinforcements arrived in the orbital battle, Madine and the Rogues were time pressed to upload the data. While Rogue Squadron provided covering fire and targeted the armored vehicles, Madine and his commandos engaged in a firefight with [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] and their [[E-Web heavy repeating blaster/Legends|E-web blaster]] nests. After neutralizing any remaining functional batteries and destroying the Imperial armor, Rogue Squadron covered Madine's charge to the Star Destroyer. Madine succeeded in retrieving the data from ''Razor'', returned to his transport and fled Kothlis while Rogue Squadron engaged pursuing TIE fighters. Madine and his team finished decoding the data and realized why the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] wanted it so badly—it was the technical readout for the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]]. ==Behind the scenes== The ''Motivator'' first mentioned in the ''Galaxywide NewsNets'' feature for issue number 10 of the first volume of ''Star Wars Journal'', where it stated a bit of its history. Its role was later expanded in ''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader]]'', where it was revealed to have been involved in trying to stop the Rebels from gaining the schematics for the Death Star II by capturing the ''Razor'', as well as eventually being shot down by Rogue Squadron over Kothlis, and its wreck was later infiltrated by the Rebels to recover the data as the ship was going critical. If the player managed to take out its ion cannons during the mission "Razor Rendezvous," its next appearance from "Vengeance of Kothlis" will have the ion cannons being damaged, thus making it slightly easier for the player to get through the mission. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]'' {{C|Co-op campaign}} *{{JournalCite|10|Galaxywide NewsNets}} {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide]]'' *''[[Star Wars Art: Visions]]'' {{Po}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Imperial-class Star Destroyers]] [[Category:Starships of the Galactic Empire]]
